description: Reflects a 3D shape across a plane
utility: Create a mirror image of a point, line, vector, or polygon across a plane

examples.expression: P = plane3d(g, 0, 0, 1, 0); A = point3d(g, 3, 4, 5); reflect3d(P, A)
P = plane3d(g, 1, 0, 0, 0); V = vector3d(g, 0, 0, 0, 1, 1, 1); reflect3d(P, V)
P = plane3d(g, 0, 1, 0, 0); poly = polygon3d(g, point3d(g, 0, 0, 0), point3d(g, 1, 0, 0), point3d(g, 1, 0, 1)); reflect3d(P, poly)
